summary: Implement Okta SSO for enterprise tier
description:
As an enterprise admin, I want to configure SSO with Okta so that my team can authenticate using our existing identity provider.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Support OAuth2/OIDC flow with Okta
- Handle SAML assertions
- Token exchange for session management
- Support for multiple Okta organizations

summary: Handle encoded parameters in Okta callback URLs
description:
Bug: When Okta sends callback with URL-encoded parameters (especially with special characters in state param), the auth flow fails with a 400 error.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Configure SSO with org that has special chars in name
2. Initiate login flow
3. Okta callback fails

Expected: Auth flow completes successfully regardless of encoding.

summary: Support Okta directory sync for user provisioning
description:
Enterprise customers need automatic user provisioning when they enable Okta directory sync. This should:
- Implement SCIM 2.0 endpoints
- Handle create/update/deactivate user events
- Sync user attributes (name, email, groups)
- Support incremental sync
